use_cases: Navigation menus for web applications requiring dropdown or contextual menu interactions
Settings panels and option selection interfaces within SaaS dashboards
Accessible menu systems with keyboard navigation support
ai_summary: A reusable dropdown menu component built on base-ui primitives, featuring styled popup positioning with border, shadow, and rounded corners. Supports multi-direction anchoring (top/bottom/left/right), customizable offsets, and keyboard navigation. Uses CSS custom properties for theming with light/dark mode support.
